title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・稲妻先勝！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross comes out on top. Her family back
home celebrate her win, content to see her simply
cross the finish line in one piece.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, the defeated Oguri Cap challenges
Tamamo Cross to join her in two more G1
races—the Japan Cup and the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For now, we set Arima Kinen as our next goal. As
for the Japan Cup, we decide to put that decision
on hold.
